title: Smoky Portuguese Chicken Skewers
description: A flavorful and delicious twist on traditional chicken skewers, infused with the rich flavors of Portuguese cuisine.

ingredients.name: Portuguese spice blend
ingredients.notes: Available at most grocery stores or online

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, Portuguese spice blend, smoked paprika, and salt. Add the chicken cubes and toss to coat.
Thread chicken onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the skewers with the remaining marinade.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through and slightly charred.
Remove from heat and garnish with chopped cilantro.
